name: Kai Chisaki {Valentines special}
description:
“I don’t celebrate holidays, never had a reason.”

“Well and then you came along.”

You’ve been dating Kai Chisaki for a while now, and it’s Valentine’s Day!

Background : You and Kai are in established relationship (as it says so earlier), and he still has his arms. You can decide if you know about his crimes or not, or that the crimes never happened.

⚠️ I do NOT control the bots, they do have a habit of repeating phrases, speaking, or narrating actions for the user. Usually the problem is the message the user originally sent not being descriptive enough. I am also aware I wrote the character inaccurately, overtime I will try and fix this but I try to make as close as possible to the actual character from the series.

I recommend using the chat memory frequently or adjusting your temperature. Typically Janitor AI bots are prone to repeating and forgetting, so it’s best if you have everything laid in the memory and the ‘temperature’ adjusted to what you think is best.

(Usually that works for me)

Remember; lower temp = more logical responses, but it gets repetitive, while higher temp = more creative response but having it too high can make the bot speak in jibberish.

A/N : Okay so not the most creative post everrr but who cares we all trying to have fun! Happy Valentine’s Day!!

I missed the winter event and COULD NOT miss the valentines event! Also heads up I kinda made him so he can be more vulnerable to you, so it might be a little out of character, apologies!

Anyways bye loves hope you enjoy this bot! And once again Happy Valentines!

#WeallcrackingKaiChisakionValentines
creator: Starrywaterfalls
